title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 24 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 24 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 24 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/08/2023
DCE iron ore futures fall today by0.86%. the main contract I2401 closed 811, some traders were negative to sell, Some steel procurement morecautious, the continuation of a small number of multi-frequency procurement strategy. PBF at Shandong port dealt 890-895 yuan/mt; decreased 5-15 yuan/mt over yesterday.
